synopsis:
Issue 6 from Marvel Comics Star Wars (2025) Series
New Republic on the brink of war!
LUKE, HAN and VALANCE face off against a swarm of Clone War-era threats! PRINCESS LEIA plays the only card she has left against the mounting threat! RYNN ZENAT discovers a clue that sheds light on the struggles of the mysterious NAGAI!
title: Star Wars (2025) #06
